Test that single-quoted attribute values are parsed identically to double-quoted ones.

Block Macros

Inline Macros

Image with comma:

Image with dimensions:

Icon with quoted title: [heart]

Quote Block

You don’t know about me.

— Mark Twain
Adventures of Huckleberry Finn

Verse Block

The fog comes
on little cat feet.
— Carl Sandburg
Fog

puts "hello"
